name: anthropic-docs-skills-autoupdated
description: Auto-updated multi-skill reference for the whole Anthropic doc ecosystem. Ships 7 per-skill payloads (claude-code, claude-agent-sdk, anthropic-api, anthropic-platform-features, claude-connectors, claude-cowork, mcp-spec) backed by a shared daily pipeline. Each skill mirrors its upstream docs and surfaces a curated reference at intent-match time.
